## Summary

**Short description of the proposed feature**

## Problem or Motivation

**What problem does this solve? Why is it needed?**

## Proposed Solution

**How should it work? Describe your ideal implementation**

## Alternatives Considered

**What other approaches did you consider? Why were they rejected?**

## Implementation Details (Optional)

**If you have thoughts on implementation, describe them here**

## Urgency

- [ ] Nice to have
- [ ] Should have
- [ ] Must have

## Additional Context

- Any mockups, examples, or references
- Related issues or PRs
- Any other relevant information
